manifest.name: Word count
manifest.author: Mycelium examples
manifest.description: Logs word + character counts every time a note is saved.

code: mycelium.on('note:saved', (note) => { const words = (note.body || '').trim().split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean).length; const chars = (note.body || '').length; mycelium.log('saved', note.title || 'Untitled', '-', words, 'words /', chars, 'chars'); });
